name: Dear Doctor, I'm Coming For Soul
original_name: คุณหมอครับ ผมมารับวิญญาณคนไข้
overview: Dr. Prakam, a dedicated surgeon, faces an unexpected visitor—Death itself. As they clash daily, an unlikely love begins to blossom between them, defying fate.
